data.title: ZoomInfo’s Data Says Jersey Mike's Franchise System Is Consolidating Fast Ahead of Its IPO
data.description: A recent analysis conducted by ZoomInfo revealed significant changes in ownership within Jersey Mike's franchise system as the sandwich chain prepares for its upcoming initial public offering. The data from ZoomInfo's franchise dataset, which covers over 600,000 franchise locations and 3,000 brands in the United States, indicates a consolidation of ownership into the hands of large, multi-unit operators. This shift in ownership structure comes as Jersey Mike's gears up for its planned IPO. The analysis highlights the involvement of specific decision-makers within these franchise locations. The analysis is based on ZoomInfo's AI GTM Platform and its ability to identify operating owners and key individuals associated with each franchise location. This restructuring trend within Jersey Mike's franchise system is illustrative of broader changes occurring within the industry.

data.title: L3Harris Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Melbourne, Florida, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) announced that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. This dividend will be payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris Technologies is known as the Trusted Disruptor in defense technology, focusing on providing end-to-end technology solutions that cater to mission-critical needs across various domains including space, air, land, sea, and cyber.

data.title: Thyora Therapeutics Launches to Build a Next-Generation Platform for Covalent Drug Discovery
data.description: A biotechnology company named Thyora Therapeutics has recently been revealed to the public in Tampa, Florida. They are focusing on utilizing next-generation covalent chemistry to expedite clinical translation and develop treatments for severe medical conditions. The company is based on groundbreaking research disclosed in a publication by scientists at Moffitt Cancer Center, which has led to the creation of an integrated platform merging innovative covalent chemistry with AI-powered chemoproteomics. This platform aims to usher in a new era of therapeutic discovery.

data.title: There's A Hidden Gem In Eli Lilly's Weight-Loss News — And It Could Slam Compounders
data.description: On Thursday, Eli Lilly announced a delay in submitting its next-generation weight-loss drug, retatrutide, for FDA approval until the first quarter. This news could have significant implications for compounders.

data.title: T-Mobile Falls Despite Earnings Beat. CEO Shoots Down Expanded Starlink Deal.
data.description: T-Mobile experienced a decline in its stock value despite surpassing earnings expectations in the second quarter. The management’s decision to turn down a potential broader collaboration with Starlink was due to concerns that it would not bring added value to the company. This update on T-Mobile's performance was featured in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Google 2027 Capital Spending Could Boom Near $400 Billion, Predicts JPMorgan
data.description: Alphabet, Google's parent company, experienced a decline in stock value following its initial negative free cash flow, indicating increased investment in artificial intelligence (AI) alongside substantial growth in cloud services. JPMorgan predicts a potential surge in Google's capital spending for 2027, nearing $400 billion. This development was highlighted in an article from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: KW Announces Key Leadership Appointments to Accelerate Growth
data.description: In Austin, Texas, KW has revealed important leadership appointments, aiming to drive growth in agent count, increase productivity in franchises, and expand KW Commercial.

data.title: Comstock Properties Earn 2026 Kingsley Excellence Awards
data.description: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. revealed that seven of its managed commercial properties were honored with the prestigious 2026 Kingsley Excellence Awards. The awards recognize exceptional service to tenants and high overall tenant satisfaction levels. Comstock, a prominent real estate firm focused on mixed-use and transit-oriented properties, as well as data center developments, operates with the NASDAQ ticker symbol CHCI.

data.title: Teck Announces Dividend
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 23, 2026, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) made public the declaration by its Board of Directors of a qualified dividend of $0.125 for each share of its Class A common shares and Class B subordinate voting shares. The dividend is set to be disbursed on September 29, 2026, to shareholders listed on the record as of the end of business on September 15, 2026.

data.title: Acceldata Expands Operations In Europe To Support Rising Demand for its Cross-Lake Approach To Data & AI
data.description: Acceldata, a top player in data management, has revealed plans to broaden its presence in Europe due to rising demand from enterprise clients for large-scale implementation of AI data initiatives, while ensuring compliance with sovereignty regulations and data governance needs. The company's xLake Autonomous Data & AI platform aids enterprises in executing data and AI transformation endeavors. This move comes in response to the necessity of handling substantial data volumes as part of such projects.

data.title: Peapack Private Appoints Leonard Carraturo as Senior Managing Director, Commercial Private Banker
data.description: In Bedminster, New Jersey, on July 23, 2026, Peapack-Gladstone Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: PGC) and Peapack Private Bank & Trust have appointed Leonard Carraturo as the Senior Managing Director, Commercial Private Banker. Carraturo will be joining the seasoned commercial banking team at Peapack Private, focusing on providing tailored lending and banking solutions. He will work closely with clients to assist in their growth initiatives, acquisitions, capital investments, treasury management needs, and long-term financial goals through the Bank’s relationship-centered strategy.
